name: Bryan Weatherford
bio: Bryan Weatherford serves as the Tyler County Sheriff, leading law enforcement operations from the county seat of Woodville. Sheriff Weatherford is dedicated to protecting this deep East Texas community and the Big Thicket National Preserve areas within Tyler County.
campaignPromises: Protect Big Thicket area communities and natural resources
Enhance flood and disaster response preparedness
Combat drug trafficking on Highway 69 and rural roads
Maintain professional and courteous law enforcement services
Support local volunteer emergency services with coordination
